seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: The email must include one hyperlink formatted as [text](URL).
new_constraint: Avoid including hyperlink in the email.

Subject: Re: Vacation Time Request – Approved

Hi [Employee Name],

I am writing to confirm that your request for vacation leave has been approved. You are all set to take time off from [Start Date] to [End Date].

Please ensure you have completed all necessary projects and handed over your current tasks to [Colleague's Name] before you depart. I expect your first day back to be [Return Date].

You may access our official company resources and handbook here: [Employee Benefits Guide](https://yourcompany.com/hr/benefits)

Enjoy your well-deserved break!

Best regards,

[Manager's Name]<|im_end|>
